phrases.english: I need to finish this report by tomorrow.
phrases.arabic: أحتاج إلى إنهاء هذا التقرير بحلول الغد.
phrases.pronunciation: Ahtaj ila inhā' hādhā al-taqrīr biḥulūl al-ghad.
phrases.context: Use this when discussing deadlines for work tasks.

phrases.english: Can you please send me the meeting agenda?
phrases.arabic: هل يمكنك فضلاً إرسال جدول أعمال الاجتماع إلي؟
phrases.pronunciation: Hal yumkinuka faḍlan irsāl jadwal aʿmāl al-ijtimāʿ ilayya?
phrases.context: Ask for information needed before a meeting.

phrases.english: I have a business meeting at ten o'clock.
phrases.arabic: لدي اجتماع عمل في تمام الساعة العاشرة.
phrases.pronunciation: Ladaiy ijtimāʿ ʿamal fī tamām al-sāʿah al-ʿāshirah.
phrases.context: Inform someone about your scheduled work appointments.

phrases.english: Where is the nearest post office?
phrases.context: Ask for directions to a common business-related service.

phrases.english: I would like to book a flight to Dubai.
phrases.arabic: أود حجز رحلة طيران إلى دبي.
phrases.pronunciation: Awad ḥajz riḥlat ṭayarān ilā Dubay.
phrases.context: Use this when arranging business travel.
